t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Withdrawal request identifier. Primary key, IDENTITY starting at 1. HASH distribution key and clustered index column.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Withdrawal request identifier. Primary key, IDENTITY starting at 1. HASH distribution key and clustered index column. Passthrough from Fact_BillingWithdraw.
Customer ID. FK to Customer.CustomerStatic. Passthrough from Fact_BillingWithdraw.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Surrogate primary key of the WithdrawToFunding execution leg. Renamed from ID.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Surrogate primary key of the WithdrawToFunding execution leg. Renamed from ID. Passthrough from Fact_BillingWithdraw.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Internal reason code for the withdrawal decision (e.g., why cancelled or flagged). FK to Dim_CashoutReason.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Internal reason code for the withdrawal decision (e.g., why cancelled or flagged). FK to Dim_CashoutReason. Passthrough from Fact_BillingWithdraw.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable reason label. No unique constraint. Displayed in BackOffice withdrawal screens via LEFT JOIN. Used in reports, audit trails, and customer-facing credit history.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable reason label. No unique constraint. Displayed in BackOffice withdrawal screens via LEFT JOIN. Used in reports, audit trails, and customer-facing credit history. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_CashoutReason.Name.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_Country.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.CountryID at point-in-time.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.PlayerLevelID at point-in-time.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable PI tier name. Values: No, Certified, Cadet, Rising Star, Champion, Elite, Elite Pro, Removed, Rejected. Used in BackOffice customer views, Trade procedures, and SalesForce integration.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable PI tier name. Values: No, Certified, Cadet, Rising Star, Champion, Elite, Elite Pro, Removed, Rejected. Used in BackOffice customer views, Trade procedures, and SalesForce integration. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_GuruStatus.GuruStatusName via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.GuruStatusID at point-in-time.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable account type label. Maps to Dictionary.AccountType.AccountTypeName in production (renamed in DWH). Used in reporting to display account classification.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable account type label. Maps to Dictionary.AccountType.AccountTypeName in production (renamed in DWH). Used in reporting to display account classification. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_AccountType.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.AccountTypeID at point-in-time.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: APEX broker external ID. Decimal(38,0) to accommodate APEX very large numeric ID format.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: APEX broker external ID. Decimal(38,0) to accommodate APEX very large numeric ID format. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.ExternalID (joined via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RealCID). Stored as varchar(200) in this table.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Payment method name (e.g., CreditCard, Wire, PayPal, Skrill, Neteller, ApplePay, GooglePay).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Payment method name (e.g., CreditCard, Wire, PayPal, Skrill, Neteller, ApplePay, GooglePay). Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_FundingType.Name via Fact_BillingWithdraw.FundingTypeID_Funding.

issues.problem: Missing UC Target row. Should state N/A if no UC export exists for this table.
Inherited description includes FBW-specific physical properties (HASH distribution key, clustered index) that do not apply to the BI_DB table (ROUND_ROBIN / HEAP). Could mislead readers.
No explicit NULL-rate documentation for the two LEFT JOIN columns. Section 3.4 mentions they may be NULL but doesn't quantify.
Type is bigint in BI_DB DDL but int in FBW wiki. Inherited description does not note the type widening.
Data claims dated 2025-10-27 are ~6 months stale. Not structural but worth refreshing.
